requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (KS IEC 62471 Risk Groups) under PVoC
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（KS IEC 62471 危险组别）（PVoC 下）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（KS IEC 62471 危險組別）（PVoC 下）

summary.en: Kenya addresses photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems through the Kenya Standard adopting IEC 62471 (KS IEC 62471: photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), used to classify a product into a risk group from RG0 (Exempt — no hazard) to RG3 (High risk) based on blue-light weighted radiance and irradiance. Where the lamp performance/safety KS standards (e.g., KS IEC 62560 for self-ballasted LED lamps, KS IEC 60598 for luminaires) reference photobiological safety, the risk-group assessment forms part of the technical evidence verified under the KEBS PVoC programme. Kenya does not operate a single EU-style Ecodesign regulation that makes photobiological classification a standalone horizontal obligation; instead the requirement is carried by the adopted KS / IEC standard cited for the product type during PVoC. RG2 and above typically require warnings and usage information.
summary.zh: 肯尼亚通过采用 IEC 62471 的肯尼亚标准（KS IEC 62471：灯和灯系统的光生物安全）处理光生物安全，依据蓝光加权辐亮度和辐照度将产品分类至从 RG0（豁免——无危害）至 RG3（高危险）的危险组别。在灯性能/安全 KS 标准（如自镇流 LED 灯 KS IEC 62560、灯具 KS IEC 60598）引用光生物安全的情况下，危险组别评估构成在 KEBS PVoC 程序下核验的技术证据的一部分。肯尼亚不实行将光生物分类作为独立横向义务的单一欧盟式生态设计法规；该要求由 PVoC 期间针对产品类型引用的所采用 KS / IEC 标准承载。RG2 及以上通常须附带警告及使用信息。
summary.zht: 肯亞通過採用 IEC 62471 的肯亞標準（KS IEC 62471：燈和燈系統的光生物安全）處理光生物安全，依據藍光加權輻亮度和輻照度將產品分類至從 RG0（豁免——無危害）至 RG3（高危險）的危險組別。在燈性能/安全 KS 標準（如自鎮流 LED 燈 KS IEC 62560、燈具 KS IEC 60598）引用光生物安全的情況下，危險組別評估構成在 KEBS PVoC 程序下核驗的技術證據的一部分。肯亞不實行將光生物分類作為獨立橫向義務的單一歐盟式生態設計法規；該要求由 PVoC 期間針對產品類型引用的所採用 KS / IEC 標準承載。RG2 及以上通常須附帶警告及使用信息。

standards_or_laws: KS IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (Kenya Standard adopting IEC 62471; risk group classification)
KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme — technical verification of lamp safety evidence

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006. GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market. Enforcement and testing obligations are less prescriptive for residential luminaires than where a binding regulatory framework applies.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均为强制要求。与具有约束性的监管框架相比，中国对居民灯具的执行及检测义务规定不够严格。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均為強制要求。與具有約束性的監管框架相比，中國對居民燈具的執行及檢測義務規定不夠嚴格。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard)

gap.en: Both Kenya (KS IEC 62471) and China (GB/T 20145) derive from IEC 62471, so the test method and risk-group framework are technically aligned. The difference is enforcement context: in China GB/T 20145 is recommended-only and not routinely enforced for residential luminaires, whereas in Kenya the photobiological risk-group evidence is verified as part of the KEBS PVoC technical assessment where the cited KS lamp standard references it — meaning a documented risk-group assessment may be required before the Certificate of Conformity is issued. Manufacturers exporting to Kenya should (1) hold a defensible risk-group assessment, commonly by testing to KS IEC 62471 / IEC 62471, and (2) provide warnings and usage information for RG2 and above. RG3 products face significant restrictions. Confirm with the appointed PVoC partner whether risk-group evidence is required for the specific product type.
gap.zh: 肯尼亚（KS IEC 62471）与中国（GB/T 20145）均源自 IEC 62471，检测方法和危险组别框架技术上一致。差异在于执行环境：在中国，GB/T 20145 仅为推荐性标准，对居民灯具未常态化执行；而在肯尼亚，当引用的 KS 灯标准涉及光生物安全时，危险组别证据作为 KEBS PVoC 技术评估的一部分被核验——即在签发符合性证书前可能须提供已记录的危险组别评估。向肯尼亚出口的制造商应：（1）持有可辩护的危险组别评估，通常通过 KS IEC 62471 / IEC 62471 检测；（2）为 RG2 及以上提供警告及使用信息。RG3 产品面临重大限制。请向指定 PVoC 合作机构确认具体产品类型是否须提供危险组别证据。
gap.zht: 肯亞（KS IEC 62471）與中國（GB/T 20145）均源自 IEC 62471，檢測方法和危險組別框架技術上一致。差異在於執行環境：在中國，GB/T 20145 僅為推薦性標準，對居民燈具未常態化執行；而在肯亞，當引用的 KS 燈標準涉及光生物安全時，危險組別證據作為 KEBS PVoC 技術評估的一部分被核驗——即在簽發符合性證書前可能須提供已記錄的危險組別評估。向肯亞出口的製造商應：（1）持有可辯護的危險組別評估，通常通過 KS IEC 62471 / IEC 62471 檢測；（2）為 RG2 及以上提供警告及使用信息。RG3 產品面臨重大限制。請向指定 PVoC 合作機構確認具體產品類型是否須提供危險組別證據。

mandatory_status.target: Verified within PVoC where referenced — photobiological risk-group evidence to KS IEC 62471 is assessed as part of the KEBS PVoC technical documentation where the cited KS lamp standard references it; not a standalone EU-style horizontal obligation
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is not universally prescribed

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kenya assesses photobiological risk-group classification to KS IEC 62471 as part of the KEBS PVoC technical documentation where the cited KS lamp standard references it, rather than as an EU-style standalone horizontal obligation. The test method is technically aligned with CN GB/T 20145 (both IEC 62471-derived), so the gap is enforcement and documentation, not metrics. Hold a defensible risk-group assessment, provide warnings for RG2 and above, and confirm with the appointed PVoC partner whether risk-group evidence is required for the specific product type.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在引用的 KS 灯标准涉及光生物安全时，肯尼亚将 KS IEC 62471 的危险组别分类作为 KEBS PVoC 技术文件的一部分评估，而非欧盟式独立横向义务。检测方法与中国 GB/T 20145（均源自 IEC 62471）技术一致，因此差距在于执行和文件，而非计量。请持有可辩护的危险组别评估，为 RG2 及以上提供警告，并向指定 PVoC 合作机构确认具体产品类型是否须提供危险组别证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在引用的 KS 燈標準涉及光生物安全時，肯亞將 KS IEC 62471 的危險組別分類作為 KEBS PVoC 技術文件的一部分評估，而非歐盟式獨立橫向義務。檢測方法與中國 GB/T 20145（均源自 IEC 62471）技術一致，因此差距在於執行和文件，而非計量。請持有可辯護的危險組別評估，為 RG2 及以上提供警告，並向指定 PVoC 合作機構確認具體產品類型是否須提供危險組別證據。

requirement_topic.en: Lamp Safety and Marking — KS IEC 62560 Self-Ballasted LED Lamps under PVoC
requirement_topic.zh: 灯安全与标志——KS IEC 62560 自镇流 LED 灯（PVoC 下）
requirement_topic.zht: 燈安全與標誌——KS IEC 62560 自鎮流 LED 燈（PVoC 下）

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps (LED bulbs with integrated control gear, > 50 V) imported into Kenya are verified under the KEBS PVoC programme against the Kenya Standard adopting IEC 62560 (KS IEC 62560: self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — safety specifications). This covers marking, interchangeability, protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and electric strength, mechanical strength, cap temperature rise, resistance to heat and flame, and fault conditions. Mandatory product markings (rated voltage, wattage, lumen, cap type, manufacturer identification) must appear on the lamp and packaging. Verified compliance is a condition of the Certificate of Conformity, and the KEBS Standardization Mark / Import Standardization Mark must be applied. There is no single EU-style horizontal directive in Kenya — the obligation is carried by the cited KS / IEC lamp standard under PVoC.
summary.zh: 进口至肯尼亚的自镇流 LED 灯（集成控制装置的 LED 灯泡，> 50 V）在 KEBS PVoC 程序下，依据采用 IEC 62560 的肯尼亚标准（KS IEC 62560：普通照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求）核验。其涵盖标志、互换性、防触电、绝缘电阻和电气强度、机械强度、灯头温升、耐热与耐燃及故障状态。强制性产品标志（额定电压、功率、光通量、灯头型号、制造商标识）须出现在灯及包装上。经核验的符合性是符合性证书的条件，并须加贴 KEBS 标准化标志/进口标准化标志。肯尼亚不存在欧盟式单一横向指令——该义务由 PVoC 下引用的 KS / IEC 灯标准承载。
summary.zht: 進口至肯亞的自鎮流 LED 燈（集成控制裝置的 LED 燈泡，> 50 V）在 KEBS PVoC 程序下，依據採用 IEC 62560 的肯亞標準（KS IEC 62560：普通照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求）核驗。其涵蓋標誌、互換性、防觸電、絕緣電阻和電氣強度、機械強度、燈頭溫升、耐熱與耐燃及故障狀態。強制性產品標誌（額定電壓、功率、光通量、燈頭型號、製造商標識）須出現在燈及包裝上。經核驗的符合性是符合性證書的條件，並須加貼 KEBS 標準化標誌/進口標準化標誌。肯亞不存在歐盟式單一橫向指令——該義務由 PVoC 下引用的 KS / IEC 燈標準承載。

standards_or_laws: KS IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage > 50 V — Safety specifications (Kenya Standard adopting IEC 62560)
KEBS Standardization Mark / Import Standardization Mark — mandatory marking on verified imported goods

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 24906-2010 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage > 50 V — Safety specifications), aligned with IEC 62560, together with GB/T 24908 for performance. For self-ballasted LED lamps sold in China, CCC certification may apply depending on the product category, administered by CNCA via authorized bodies such as CQC. Mandatory product marking under the GB standard covers electrical ratings and manufacturer identification. CN CCC certification and GB test reports are not automatically accepted under the KEBS PVoC route.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 24906-2010（普通照明用 50 V 以上自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求），与 IEC 62560 对齐，性能方面配合 GB/T 24908。对于在中国销售的自镇流 LED 灯，视产品类别可能适用 CCC 认证，由 CNCA 通过 CQC 等授权机构管理。GB 标准下的强制性产品标志涵盖电气额定值及制造商标识。中国 CCC 认证及 GB 检测报告不被 KEBS PVoC 路径自动接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 24906-2010（普通照明用 50 V 以上自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求），與 IEC 62560 對齊，性能方面配合 GB/T 24908。對於在中國銷售的自鎮流 LED 燈，視產品類別可能適用 CCC 認證，由 CNCA 通過 CQC 等授權機構管理。GB 標準下的強制性產品標誌涵蓋電氣額定值及製造商標識。中國 CCC 認證及 GB 檢測報告不被 KEBS PVoC 路徑自動接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906-2010 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage > 50 V — Safety specifications (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 62560)
CNCA CCC certification — applicable to certain LED lamp categories in China

gap.en: KS IEC 62560 and CN GB 24906 share the IEC 62560 technical base, so the safety requirements are largely harmonized, but several Kenya-specific gaps exist: (1) compliance must be verified under the KEBS PVoC programme and a Certificate of Conformity issued before import — a CN CCC certificate alone does not substitute; (2) the KEBS Standardization Mark / Import Standardization Mark must be applied to verified goods, which CN-market products do not carry; (3) the nominal supply voltage in Kenya is 240 V / 50 Hz (vs China's 220 V / 50 Hz) — frequency matches, but the manufacturer must confirm the lamp's rated voltage range and markings suit 240 V mains and that ratings shown match the Kenyan supply; (4) mandatory markings must reflect the Kenyan-market configuration. The PVoC test report should come from a laboratory accepted by the appointed PVoC partner. Confirm the applicable PVoC route for the export volume.
gap.zh: KS IEC 62560 与中国 GB 24906 同以 IEC 62560 为技术基础，安全要求基本协调，但存在若干肯尼亚特有差距：（1）符合性须在 KEBS PVoC 程序下核验，进口前须签发符合性证书——仅有中国 CCC 证书不可替代；（2）须对经核验货物加贴 KEBS 标准化标志/进口标准化标志，中国市场产品不具备；（3）肯尼亚标称供电电压为 240 V / 50 Hz（中国为 220 V / 50 Hz）——频率相同，但制造商须确认灯的额定电压范围及标志适合 240 V 电网，且所示额定值与肯尼亚供电匹配；（4）强制性标志须反映肯尼亚市场配置。PVoC 检测报告应来自指定 PVoC 合作机构接受的实验室。请就出口量确认适用的 PVoC 路径。
gap.zht: KS IEC 62560 與中國 GB 24906 同以 IEC 62560 為技術基礎，安全要求基本協調，但存在若干肯亞特有差距：（1）符合性須在 KEBS PVoC 程序下核驗，進口前須簽發符合性證書——僅有中國 CCC 證書不可替代；（2）須對經核驗貨物加貼 KEBS 標準化標誌/進口標準化標誌，中國市場產品不具備；（3）肯亞標稱供電電壓為 240 V / 50 Hz（中國為 220 V / 50 Hz）——頻率相同，但製造商須確認燈的額定電壓範圍及標誌適合 240 V 電網，且所示額定值與肯亞供電匹配；（4）強制性標誌須反映肯亞市場配置。PVoC 檢測報告應來自指定 PVoC 合作機構接受的實驗室。請就出口量確認適用的 PVoC 路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — KS IEC 62560 safety compliance for self-ballasted LED lamps is verified under the KEBS PVoC programme; a Certificate of Conformity and the Standardization Mark / Import Standardization Mark are required before import and sale
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where in CCC scope — GB 24906-2010 safety compliance applies; CCC certification may be required for certain LED lamp categories

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Self-ballasted LED lamps entering Kenya are verified to KS IEC 62560 under the KEBS PVoC programme, with a Certificate of Conformity and the Standardization Mark / Import Standardization Mark required before import and sale. The safety content is largely harmonized with CN GB 24906 (both IEC 62560-derived), but CN CCC alone does not satisfy PVoC, the Kenyan mark must be applied, and the lamp must be rated and marked for the 240 V / 50 Hz Kenyan supply. Use a PVoC-accepted laboratory and confirm the applicable PVoC route for the export volume.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入肯尼亚的自镇流 LED 灯在 KEBS PVoC 程序下按 KS IEC 62560 核验，进口和销售前须取得符合性证书并加贴标准化标志/进口标准化标志。安全内容与中国 GB 24906（均源自 IEC 62560）基本协调，但仅有中国 CCC 不满足 PVoC，须加贴肯尼亚标志，且灯须按肯尼亚 240 V / 50 Hz 供电额定并标志。请使用 PVoC 接受的实验室，并就出口量确认适用的 PVoC 路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入肯亞的自鎮流 LED 燈在 KEBS PVoC 程序下按 KS IEC 62560 核驗，進口和銷售前須取得符合性證書並加貼標準化標誌/進口標準化標誌。安全內容與中國 GB 24906（均源自 IEC 62560）基本協調，但僅有中國 CCC 不滿足 PVoC，須加貼肯亞標誌，且燈須按肯亞 240 V / 50 Hz 供電額定並標誌。請使用 PVoC 接受的實驗室，並就出口量確認適用的 PVoC 路徑。
